chunks.title: Address to Doeg
chunks.reason: The psalmist directly addresses the wicked man Doeg with a series of accusations and predictions of judgment.

chunks.title: Observation by the Righteous
chunks.reason: The righteous observers react to Doeg's downfall with fear and mockery, summarizing his error.

chunks.title: Psalmist's Confidence and Praise
chunks.reason: The psalmist shifts to a personal declaration of trust in God and offers thanks for His deliverance.
